subject: My visit
body:
Dear Lesley 
Can you check with Jeffry if I can visit him at island on No 30 th afternoon I will leave to Montreal 1 st at 4 pm 
I have a tight schedule :
Montreal on 2 nd meeting the Primeminister 
Boston 3 rd meeting joi Itoh
Lima 4/5 th meeting Primeminister on 4 th and president on 5 th
Dubai 8 th Dpworld board meeting 
 Sultan 
Sent from my iPhone
NOTE: This e-mail message is subject to the Dubai World Group disclaimer see http://www.dubaiworld.ae/email_disclaimer
